comment: Synthetic metastatic NSCLC adenocarcinoma, never-smoker female 73, MET exon 14 skipping mutation confirmed on RNA-NGS, progressed on 1L chemo (older patient declined IO due to autoimmune hx). Line of therapy = 2. Engine routes ALGO-NSCLC-METASTATIC-2L step 1 (no EGFR) → step 4 (no ALK) → step 6 (no ROS1) → step 8 (no KRAS G12C) → step 10 (MET fires) → step 11 (no preference for once-daily, default) → IND-NSCLC-2L-MET-EX14-CAPMATINIB (GEOMETRY mono-1, ORR 41% pretreated).

prior_lines.regimen: carboplatin + pemetrexed (no IO due to autoimmune hx)
